metadata.title: The Arab Branches - HaNoar HaOved VeHaLomed
metadata.description: A Home for Hope - the Arab Branches of HaNoar HaOved VeHaLomed youth movement: 55 towns, 20,000 members, and a leadership path from 4th grade to leading the community.

hero.subtitle: The Arab Branches of HaNoar HaOved VeHaLomed youth movement
hero.imageAlt: Movement members in the blue shirts

about.title: Who We Are
about.p1: HaNoar HaOved VeHaLomed (the Working and Studying Youth) was founded in 1924 to defend the rights of young workers. The blue shirt symbolizes the working class, and the red lanyard - the blood of workers who fought for their rights.
about.p2: In 1983 the Arab Branches Circle was founded within the movement. Today we are active in 55 Arab and Bedouin towns and mixed cities across four districts.
about.p3: We believe in equality and social justice, and we raise a generation of responsible leaders who take an active part in their community and lead it toward a better tomorrow.
about.imageAlt: Educational activity at one of the branches

path.title: The Leadership Path
path.subtitle: Youth leading youth - an incubator for leadership in Arab society
path.stage1Points: Weekly branch activity|Values education|Trips and camps|Meeting the other|Volunteering in town
path.stage2Points: Leading and guiding groups|Public speaking|Shaping identity
path.stage3Title: National Service Group in Movement Shirts
path.stage3Points: Leading branches|Role models for the younger generation|Hebrew studies|Jewish-Arab-Druze encounters
path.stage4Points: Town coordinators|Alumni leading in the community

alumni.title: Our Alumni
alumni.slogan: كنت جزءاً من القصة... ابقَ جزءاً من العائلة
alumni.sloganTranslation: You were part of the story... stay part of the family
alumni.text: The Arab Branches alumni network connects thousands of graduates who lead today in education, medicine, hi-tech, academia, local government, law and culture.
